name: Mei Sum Dim Sum
tagline: A Chinatown dim sum staple for over 20 years — 150+ Cantonese dishes, cart service, and a Honolulu Magazine reader favorite.
mustOrder: siu mai — the classic pork and shrimp dumpling
cheung fun — silky rice noodle rolls
egg tarts — flaky, custard-filled, warm from the cart
parking: Metered street parking on Nu'uanu Ave; nearby lots
talkStory: One of Chinatown's most reliable dim sum spots, voted a top pick in Honolulu Magazine's reader poll. Over 150 Cantonese dishes on the menu, with dim sum carts rolling from 10am to 2pm daily. The space is no-frills and the pace is fast — this is working-class Chinatown dim sum, not a polished brunch experience. Prices are remarkably low for the quality. If Legend is the bigger, flashier dim sum hall, Mei Sum is the neighborhood regular's choice. Cash preferred.
